metadata.description: Platform-agnostic SEO & AEO skills — audit, content refresh, optimization, keyword strategy, and reporting for any site (Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, Framer, Next.js, or custom code). No MCP required; GSC, PageSpeed, a CMS MCP, and Keywords Everywhere deepen the analysis when connected.

plugins.name: getting-started
plugins.description: One-time setup that captures business goals, audience, markets, brand voice, SEO/AEO constraints, your platform, and (for code-based sites) the local repo path. Saves to your project's AI config file.

plugins.name: refresh-content
plugins.description: Refresh and optimize an existing article on any site — updates dates, meta, keywords, internal links, FAQ, and schema. In a repo it edits the source file with a diff; otherwise it outputs paste-ready recommendations.

plugins.name: click-recovery
plugins.description: Find pages with high impressions but low CTR via GSC, propose better meta titles/descriptions, and apply them — editing local source files with a diff, or outputting a paste-ready table.

plugins.name: monthly-report
plugins.description: Monthly SEO report — what changed, why it matters, and what to do next. Performance overview, content analysis, technical health from a live crawl, and a prioritized action plan. GSC recommended.

plugins.name: weekly-report
plugins.description: Weekly SEO pulse — what changed this week, how it tracks against the month, and what to do now. Same depth as monthly, weekly cadence. GSC recommended; degrades to crawl + baseline comparison.

plugins.name: audit
plugins.description: Quick SEO & AEO audit from a public URL. Deterministic checks across 4 dimensions, reported as a plain-language status with prioritized opportunities. No MCP needed — works on any platform. No maturity score.

plugins.name: audit-deep
plugins.description: Platform-agnostic deep SEO and AEO audit. Runs evidence-based checks across 4 dimensions (Content, Technical, Authority, Measurement), reports each as a plain-language status, organizes findings into 3 action buckets (Technical/Content/Authority) and 3 priority tiers, and forecasts business impact per opportunity (incremental clicks/month and equivalent ad spend). Folds in client documents (crawl exports, paid-media or keyword strategy, analytics), pauses for more inputs, then assembles a structured nine-section report, then generates per-bucket working documents (tech fix checklist, topic-cluster overview, editorial content-brief sheet, backlink-opportunity and E-E-A-T lists). Adds keyword research, topic clusters, a backlink profile, and sibling-subdomain discovery. GSC, PageSpeed, a CMS MCP, and Keywords Everywhere are optional enrichments, none required. No maturity score.

plugins.name: deliverables
plugins.description: Turn an audit's working documents into branded, PDF-ready HTML reports. Renders the deep audit and its companion docs (technical fix checklist, keyword and content plan, backlink and E-E-A-T plan) into clean, print-ready report files using a brand-agnostic template. Humanized content, light background, and PDF export are built in. Applies a saved default brand automatically, or prompts when none is set. One self-contained HTML file per report, A4 portrait, Cmd+P to PDF.

plugins.name: content-model
plugins.description: Audit or design a content field model for SEO/AEO on any system — markdown/MDX front-matter, a headless CMS, a code-defined content type, or a traditional CMS. Scores fields across Core, Content, Authority, Enhancement, and Social groups.

plugins.name: keywords-opportunity
plugins.description: Discover keyword opportunities using GSC and Keywords Everywhere — surfaces striking distance keywords, uncovers new opportunities, and researches keywords for new pages, products, or topic clusters before you create them.

plugins.name: keyword-strategy
plugins.description: Build a complete keyword strategy from just a URL — analyzes the site, identifies main competitors, pulls their ranking keywords via Keywords Everywhere, finds the keyword gap, explores new keywords, then defines topic clusters, page types, and a phased roadmap based on volume and difficulty. No GSC required.

plugins.name: content-brief
plugins.description: Turn a keyword list into an execution plan — maps each keyword to the right URL on the site, decides whether to create, rework, retarget, or consolidate the page, and writes ready-to-execute content briefs (slug, title, H1, meta, outline, internal links, executing skill). Consumes /keyword-strategy output directly.

plugins.name: aeo-optimize
plugins.description: Transform any page or article into an AEO-ready answer — query alignment, direct answers, question-based structure, FAQ + schema markup, internal linking. Edits the local source file with a diff, or outputs paste-ready blocks.

plugins.name: write-blog
plugins.description: Create a new SEO and AEO-optimized article as a local source file — keyword expansion, outline approval, AI tell-tales check, humanizer pass, AEO audit, then writes the file in your project's format (or outputs a draft).

plugins.name: topic-map
plugins.description: Turn keyword exports, URL lists, and GSC data into a structured topic map — per-cluster keyword ownership tables, product page tracking, editorial→product linking status, gap analysis, cannibalization detection, and a 90-day editorial calendar.

plugins.name: ai-visibility
plugins.description: Baseline AI visibility report. Pulls AEO Copilot data (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AIO) and renders a single-page client-ready HTML diagnostic with evidence-backed findings, per-LLM scorecards, topic performance, competitor share-of-voice, and external source influence. Print-styled for Cmd+P → PDF.

plugins.name: aeo-onboard
plugins.description: Bootstrap a brand in AEO Copilot end-to-end from a URL — analyze the site, create the brand, run the technical audit, design 5 buyer-journey topics with listicle prompts, and trigger the first tracking cycle. Hands off to /ai-visibility for the baseline report.
